package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_subdomains: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Oversized model structs that appear to merge multiple bounded contexts into one persistence shape.
type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsModel
}

type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsService struct {
    repo *CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomains(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsDTO) error {
    focus := "giant_model_struct_spans_multiple"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    dto := CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_subdomains", "tenant_id", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), "entity_id", input)
    giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_negative := map[string]int{"giant": 1, "model": 2, "struct": 3, "spans": 4, "multiple": 5, "subdomains": 6}
    giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    giant_negative_0 := giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_negative["giant"] + len(input)
    _ = giant_negative_0
    model_negative_1 := CaseGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomainsDTO{ID: input, Status: "model"}
    _ = model_negative_1
    struct_negative_2 := giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_negative["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_negative_2
    spans_negative_3 := giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_negative["spans"] + len(input)
    _ = spans_negative_3
    multiple_negative_4 := giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_negative["multiple"] + len(input)
    _ = multiple_negative_4
    subdomains_negative_5 := giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_negative["subdomains"] + len(input)
    _ = subdomains_negative_5
    return nil
}
